entity: Devin Booker 70 PTS vs Boston Celtics on 2017-03-24 (PHX 120-130; Booker was 21, the youngest player ever to score 70 in a game)

query_target.sql: SELECT player_name, team_abbreviation, game_date, pts, min, fgm, fga, fg3m FROM fact_player_game_log WHERE player_name = 'Devin Booker' AND game_date = '2017-03-24' AND pts = 70

notes: Booker's 70 came in a loss, and the BBR box-score URL uses the home team (BOS) in the path even though Booker was the road team. fact_player_game_log has the road team's row directly keyed on (player_name, game_date, pts).
